zh: 看到她，他微笑了。
en: Seeing her, he smiled.

zh: 走进教室，她发现没有人。
en: Walking into the classroom, she found nobody there.

zh: 听到这个消息，他们非常高兴。
en: Hearing the news, they were very happy.

zh: 不知道该怎么办，她哭了起来。
en: Not knowing what to do, she burst into tears.

zh: 感到疲惫，他决定休息一下。
en: Feeling tired, he decided to take a rest.

zh: 从山顶看，这座城市非常美丽。
en: Seen from the top of the mountain, the city is very beautiful.

zh: 给予足够的时间，他能完成任务。
en: Given enough time, he can finish the task.

zh: 被老师表扬，她感到非常高兴。
en: Praised by the teacher, she felt very happy.

zh: 用英语写成，这封信很难理解。
en: Written in English, the letter was hard to understand.

zh: 被发现后，小偷被带到了警察局。
en: Having been caught, the thief was taken to the police station.

zh: 完成作业后，他去看电视了。
en: Having finished his homework, he went to watch TV.

zh: 吃完早饭后，她去上学了。
en: Having eaten breakfast, she went to school.

zh: 在那个城市住了多年后，他决定搬走。
en: Having lived in that city for many years, he decided to move away.

zh: 犯了错误后，他向大家道歉。
en: Having made a mistake, he apologized to everyone.

zh: 读完这本书后，她写了一篇书评。
en: Having read the book, she wrote a review.

zh: 他去图书馆是为了借书。
en: He went to the library to borrow books.

zh: 她努力学习是为了通过考试。
en: She studied hard to pass the exam.

zh: 他们早点出发是为了避免堵车。
en: They left early to avoid the traffic.

zh: 她省钱是为了买一台新电脑。
en: She saved money to buy a new computer.

zh: 他锻炼是为了保持健康。
en: He exercises to stay healthy.

zh: 坦白说，我不同意你的观点。
en: To be honest, I do not agree with you.

zh: 说实话，这个问题很难。
en: To tell the truth, this problem is very difficult.

zh: 总的来说，这次旅行很成功。
en: To sum up, the trip was very successful.

zh: 一般来说，早起对健康有益。
en: Generally speaking, getting up early is good for health.

zh: 严格来说，这个答案是不正确的。
en: Strictly speaking, this answer is not correct.

zh: 天气允许的话，我们明天去爬山。
en: Weather permitting, we will go hiking tomorrow.

zh: 工作完成后，他们去庆祝了。
en: The work finished, they went to celebrate.

zh: 眼睛闭着，她听着音乐。
en: Her eyes closed, she listened to the music.

zh: 腿受伤了，他无法参加比赛。
en: His leg injured, he could not take part in the competition.

zh: 所有问题都解决了，会议结束了。
en: All problems solved, the meeting came to an end.
